The '''Battle of Gligger''' was a confrontation during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] of [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]–[[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]<ref name="NEGTD" /> that occurred in the vicinity of<ref name="Battlenamia" /> the [[Gligger system/Legends|Gligger system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Ash Worlds/Legends|Ash Worlds]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> During the battle, the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] employed [[LIN demolitionmech autonomous minelayer/Legends|LIN demolitionmech autonomous minelayer]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]] to clear the location known as [[Marrow's Moor]]. 563 of the [[demolitionmech]] units were destroyed during that effort.<ref name="NEGTD" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Battle of Gligger was mentioned in the [[2006]] reference book ''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'' by [[Daniel Wallace]].<ref name="NEGTD" />
